description: AI-optimized metadata for Neo Component Kit - Enhanced developer experience for AI-assisted development

action.usageContext: Use for user interactions, form submissions, navigation triggers

form.usageContext: Use for data collection, user input, form validation

layout.usageContext: Use for organizing content, creating visual hierarchy

overlay.description: Components that appear over other content
overlay.usageContext: Use for confirmations, additional information, notifications

navigation.description: Components for site and page navigation
navigation.usageContext: Use for site navigation, content organization, data browsing

data-display.description: Components for displaying data and information
data-display.usageContext: Use for showing data, status information, content lists

formActions.description: Standard save/cancel button group for forms

confirmationDialog.template: Are you sure?
confirmationDialog.description: Standard confirmation modal for destructive actions

userProfileCard.description: User profile display with edit capabilities

dont: Forget loading states for async actions
Use for complex forms without proper sizing

templateLibrary.loginForm: Complete user authentication form with email/password fields and validation
templateLibrary.registrationForm: User registration form with required fields and confirmation
templateLibrary.contactForm: Contact form with name, email, message fields and validation
templateLibrary.searchInterface: Search input with results display and pagination
templateLibrary.dataManagement: CRUD interface with table, actions, and confirmation modals
templateLibrary.userProfile: Profile display and editing interface with form validation
templateLibrary.settingsPage: Settings interface with grouped options and save functionality
templateLibrary.dashboard: Dashboard layout with cards, charts, and navigation

iconKit.smartSuggestions: Context-aware icon recommendations based on component usage

designTokens.colors: 38 semantic color tokens with reactive theming support
designTokens.typography: Font size and weight tokens integrated with components

accessibility.standard: WCAG AA compliance built into all components
